title: urandra evenia
intro: Urandra evenia, also known as Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant native to North America with delicate white or yellow flowers. The plant's oil, which is extracted from its seeds, has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and anticoagulant effects. The health benefits of Urandra evenia include reducing symptoms of eczema, menopausal hot flashes, and rheumatoid arthritis, as well as improving heart health and reducing the risk of certain cancers. Herbal preparations of Urandra evenia include capsules, supplements, and topical creams, which can be found in health food stores or online.
